exploration_notes:
The configuration loading pipeline in Grafana centers on four files:

1. **pkg/setting/setting.go** — The core configuration engine. `Cfg.Load()` (line 1138) orchestrates everything: it calls `loadConfiguration()` (line 963) which loads `conf/defaults.ini` via `ini.Load()`, applies command-line default properties, loads user-specified config files via `loadSpecifiedConfigFile()` (line 922), applies environment variable overrides via `applyEnvVariableOverrides()` (line 744) which uses `EnvKey()`
